content: Really tried to make friends at fire and flow today. Don't feel like it worked. I was initiating but no one seemed to be interested in conversation. Idk if it was me or the people but I find it much easier at climbing. Maybe I need to bring a friend or something so I have a fallback to pull my spirits up when I falter. It felt like a party where you don't know anyone and don't have anything in common to talk about. Chatting out flow felt too surface level, probably because I don't know enough about it to make it a deep conversation. Eh. I'll have to find a new approach and try again. I did enjoy the flow and the people were nice, it just felt like I was existing in passing rather than someone to get to know. Bleh. Feels shit man. This is supposed to be my fun time off
